clips.title: Through the Kitchen
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, warm bustling grade. A busy restaurant kitchen mid-service, cooks working, steam and flames, ticket rail. Evening, energy. A person in a smart jacket walks confidently through the kitchen toward the dining room. The camera follows smoothly behind them on a steadicam, gliding through the space in one continuous move. Warm work-lights, steam, motion, 35mm, steadicam follow. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Rounds
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, clean clinical grade. A busy hospital corridor, staff and gurneys, bright overhead lights, signage. Day. A person in a white coat with a clipboard strides purposefully down the corridor. The camera follows smoothly behind them on a steadicam, gliding along the hallway in one continuous move. Cool even light, motion, 35mm, steadicam follow. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

Warm party light, bokeh, motion, 35mm, steadicam follow. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Trek
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, natural grade. A lush forest trail, dappled light, ferns and moss, a winding path ahead. Morning, warm. A person in hiking gear with a backpack walks steadily along the trail. The camera follows smoothly behind them on a steadicam, gliding along the path in one continuous move. Warm dappled light, green depth, motion, 35mm, steadicam follow. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.
